recommendations.title: A Walk in the Clouds
recommendations.overview: World War II vet Paul Sutton falls for a pregnant and unwed woman who persuades him -- during their first encounter -- to pose as her husband so she can face her family.

recommendations.title: Kevin & Perry Go Large

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Dune: Part Two

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: Burn

recommendations.title: The Fan
recommendations.overview: When the San Francisco Giants pay center-fielder, Bobby Rayburn $40 million to lead their team to the World Series, no one is happier or more supportive than #1 fan, Gil Renard.  When Rayburn becomes mired in the worst slump of his career, the obsess

recommendations.title: Black Butterfly
recommendations.overview: Paul is a down-on-his-luck screenwriter who picks up a drifter and offers him a place to stay. However, when the deranged stranger takes Paul hostage and forces him to write, their unhinged relationship brings buried secrets to light.

recommendations.title: Monster
recommendations.overview: The story of Steve Harmon, a 17-year-old honor student whose world comes crashing down around him when he is charged with felony murder.
